description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 37 hrs 9 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 6 mins per day. His tracked work was spread across 6 projects, with most of the time in Other, Java, and Markdown. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories are listed in the provided data.
